title: ophrys lucis
side_effects: Ophrys lucis can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Additionally, overuse of the plant's extract can lead to stomach upset, nausea, and diarrhea. In rare cases, improper use of ophrys lucis has been linked to liver damage and kidney strain, which can be life-threatening if left untreated. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using the plant for any health benefits.
